text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are in the middle of<n>a training
session, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Within the flow of anever-changing universe... my radianceis immutable... even against thequagmire... of fatigue...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, Trainer... Divine forces have<n>placed this trial
before me. By the<n>affliction of this suffering, I am
tested.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now... run! I must run! The majesty of<n>the Overlord
must be known!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite so bold a resolve, her<n>exhaustion is only
increasing. I'll<n>need to adjust her race schedule
so<n>she can get some rest.
